\tzpentry{ID5652}{Spectral Gap Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5652 introduces Spectral Gap Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Delta a_{pq} \sim a\,\mu^{1/2}\,e^{|p-q|/2}, \end{equation}
